body.raw:
# Concepts
-----

## Nodes
> Equivelant to SQL table

## Edges (Relationships / Connections)
> Ties the complexity of [[SQL Joins]]


## Knowledge Representation
- Concepts
- Resources
	- Online courses
	- Books
	- YouTube Videos
	- Bootcamps
	- Degree Programs
- Educators
- Learning Objectives

## Reason
- Who is the best YouTube creator for (concept)
- How do I learn (concept)


![[Pasted image 20230227151050.png]]
